title: poa subtilis
intro: Poa subtilis, also known as Kentucky bluegrass, is a species of grass native to Europe and Asia but has been widely naturalized in North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poa subtilis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Poa subtilis include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to alleviate a range of health issues.
